name: PayPal
description: PayPal REST API enables you to accept payments, manage orders, send payouts, handle subscriptions, create invoices, resolve disputes, and manage webhooks. Supports credit cards, debit cards, PayPal wallet, and alternative payment methods across 200+ markets.

auth.note: Obtain client_id and client_secret from PayPal Developer Dashboard. Use client credentials grant (POST to token_url with Basic auth) to get an access token.

capabilities.name: authorizations_capture
capabilities.description: Capture an authorized payment. Moves funds from the buyer.

capabilities.name: authorizations_get
capabilities.description: Show details for an authorized payment by ID.

capabilities.name: authorizations_reauthorize
capabilities.description: Reauthorize an authorized payment to extend validity.

capabilities.name: authorizations_void
capabilities.description: Void an authorized payment, releasing the held funds.

capabilities.name: balances_get
capabilities.description: List all account balances at a given date/time.

capabilities.name: captures_get
capabilities.description: Show details for a captured payment by ID.

capabilities.name: captures_refund
capabilities.description: Refund a captured payment, fully or partially.

capabilities.name: disputes_accept_claim
capabilities.description: Accept liability for a dispute claim, closing the dispute.

capabilities.name: disputes_accept_offer
capabilities.description: Accept an offer from the merchant to resolve a dispute.

capabilities.name: disputes_appeal
capabilities.description: Appeal a dispute decision.

capabilities.name: disputes_deny_offer
capabilities.description: Deny an offer from the merchant.

capabilities.name: disputes_escalate
capabilities.description: Escalate a dispute to a PayPal claim.

capabilities.name: disputes_get
capabilities.description: Show details for a dispute by ID.

capabilities.name: disputes_list
capabilities.description: List disputes with a summary of details.

capabilities.name: disputes_make_offer
capabilities.description: Make a settlement offer to resolve a dispute.

capabilities.name: disputes_provide_evidence
capabilities.description: Provide evidence for a dispute as a seller.

capabilities.name: disputes_send_message
capabilities.description: Send a message about a dispute to the other party.

capabilities.name: disputes_update
capabilities.description: Partially update a dispute (e.g., update communication details).

capabilities.name: invoices_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a sent invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_create
capabilities.description: Create a draft invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a draft or scheduled invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_delete_payment
capabilities.description: Delete an external payment record from an invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_delete_refund
capabilities.description: Delete an external refund record from an invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_generate_number
capabilities.description: Generate the next available invoice number.

capabilities.name: invoices_generate_qr_code
capabilities.description: Generate a QR code for an invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_get
capabilities.description: Show details for an invoice by ID.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: List invoices with optional filters.

capabilities.name: invoices_record_payment
capabilities.description: Record an external payment for an invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_record_refund
capabilities.description: Record an external refund for an invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_remind
capabilities.description: Send a reminder to the payer about an invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_search
capabilities.description: Search for invoices matching specific criteria.

capabilities.name: invoices_send
capabilities.description: Send or schedule an invoice to a customer.

capabilities.name: invoices_update
capabilities.description: Fully update an invoice by ID.

capabilities.name: orders_authorize
capabilities.description: Authorize payment for an approved order. Holds funds without capturing them.

capabilities.name: orders_capture
capabilities.description: Capture payment for an approved order. Finalizes the transaction and moves funds.

capabilities.name: orders_confirm
capabilities.description: Payer confirms their intent to pay for the order with their chosen payment source.

capabilities.name: orders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new payment order with one or more purchase units. The order must be approved by the buyer before capture.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Show details for an order by ID, including status, purchase units, and payment source.

capabilities.name: orders_track_create
capabilities.description: Add tracking information for a captured order.

capabilities.name: orders_tracker_update
capabilities.description: Update or cancel tracking information for an order.

capabilities.name: orders_update
capabilities.description: Update an order with CREATED or APPROVED status using JSON Patch operations.

capabilities.name: payouts_create
capabilities.description: Create a batch payout to send money to one or more recipients via PayPal.

capabilities.name: payouts_get
capabilities.description: Show status of a batch payout by ID.

capabilities.name: payouts_item_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an unclaimed payout item before the 30-day automatic refund.

capabilities.name: payouts_item_get
capabilities.description: Show details for a specific payout item by ID.

capabilities.name: plans_activate
capabilities.description: Activate a billing plan.

capabilities.name: plans_create
capabilities.description: Create a billing plan that defines pricing and billing cycle for subscriptions.

capabilities.name: plans_deactivate
capabilities.description: Deactivate a billing plan.

capabilities.name: plans_get
capabilities.description: Show details for a billing plan by ID.

capabilities.name: plans_list
capabilities.description: List billing plans.

capabilities.name: plans_update
capabilities.description: Update a billing plan.

capabilities.name: plans_update_pricing
capabilities.description: Update pricing schemes for a billing plan.

capabilities.name: products_create
capabilities.description: Create a catalog product for use with billing plans and subscriptions.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Show details for a catalog product by ID.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: List catalog products.

capabilities.name: products_update
capabilities.description: Update a catalog product.

capabilities.name: refunds_get
capabilities.description: Show details for a refund by ID.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_activate
capabilities.description: Activate a suspended subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an active subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_capture
capabilities.description: Capture an authorized payment from a subscriber.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_create
capabilities.description: Create a subscription for a buyer against a billing plan.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_get
capabilities.description: Show details for a subscription by ID.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_revise
capabilities.description: Revise a subscription to change quantity or plan.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_suspend
capabilities.description: Suspend an active subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_transactions_list
capabilities.description: List transactions for a subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_update
capabilities.description: Update a subscription.

capabilities.name: templates_create
capabilities.description: Create an invoice template.

capabilities.name: templates_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an invoice template.

capabilities.name: templates_get
capabilities.description: Show details for an invoice template.

capabilities.name: templates_list
capabilities.description: List merchant-created invoice templates.

capabilities.name: templates_update
capabilities.description: Fully update an invoice template.

capabilities.name: transactions_search
capabilities.description: Search and list transactions with filters for date range, status, and more.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Subscribe a webhook listener to events.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_event_types_list
capabilities.description: List all available webhook event types.

capabilities.name: webhooks_events_get
capabilities.description: Show details for a webhook event notification.

capabilities.name: webhooks_events_list
capabilities.description: List webhook event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_events_resend
capabilities.description: Resend a webhook event notification.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Show details for a webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhooks for the app.

capabilities.name: webhooks_simulate
capabilities.description: Simulate a webhook event with a sample payload.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook with new field values.

capabilities.name: webhooks_verify_signature
capabilities.description: Verify a webhook signature to confirm authenticity.
